faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Maspeth homes?
faqs.answer: Maspeth properties commonly experience pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Pavement ants are especially prevalent due to the neighborhood's extensive concrete infrastructure, while carpenter ants are attracted to the older wooden structures found in many Maspeth homes. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment.
